base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_6_1_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Overworld — highest flagpole in game at end (extra-points opportunity). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Overworld — highest flagpole in game at end (extra-points opportunity); scramble over 8-step staircase to time the 5000 bonus.
